sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115070" key="xrwti/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρωτίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρώς,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:302" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">302</biblScope> </bibl> (troch.).</entryFree>
